text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 240 

SPLIT_CLM_IND 

LABEL: Split Claim Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: An indicator that denotes that claims in excess of a pre-determined number of claim lines (threshold 
determined by the individual state) were split during processing. 

SHORT NAME: SPLIT_CLM_IND 

LONG NAME: SPLIT_CLM_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header
